title: AmbientVRT capture manifest
description: The internal contract every capture adapter emits and the core consumes. A top-level manifestVersion gates compatibility; the entries array carries one record per captured snapshot.

manifestVersion.description: Manifest format version as major.minor. The core refuses a manifest whose major it does not support.

id.description: Stable, semantic, platform-derived snapshot ID. Never positional. Variant suffixes are appended deterministically (e.g. components-button--primary::flutter::theme=dark).

platform.description: Capture platform that produced this snapshot.

variant.description: Structured variant dimensions, kept out of the ID as structured data so the report can group/filter by them.

dpr.description: Device pixel ratio used to render.

contentHash.description: SHA-256 (lowercase hex) of the PNG bytes. Powers flake detection and the rename heuristic.

envFingerprint.description: Identifier of the capture environment (canonical Docker image digest or toolchain versions).

imagePath.description: Relative path to the PNG within the run dir. Must be relative and end in .png.
